name: isArguments
description: The published dependency-free is-arguments package as a vendorable file. Useful when you want the classic arguments-object check locally without keeping the npm dependency.
tagline: Detect arguments objects across standard and legacy shapes.
summary: This page ships the dependency-free is-arguments file in both raw and normalized forms. The value is to keep the classic arguments-object check local and inspectable without another dependency.
nativeAlternative: There is no direct native helper for the package's exact arguments-object detection contract.

variants.label: Normalized
variants.note: Rule-based normalization for modern TS projects. The goal is easier import and build compatibility, not changed behavior.

variants.label: Raw
variants.note: Published package file kept as-is from the dependency-free release line.

note: Current is-arguments releases pull in helper packages. This snippet intentionally uses the simpler 1.0.4 release line as a vendorable first pass.
